case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. WING LIN et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-20-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC SERVED JUN-25-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, WING
